top_signals.title: Iran peace deal looms while new military action flares near Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: A senior U.S. administration official said both sides had agreed on a text and that Washington expects to sign an initial deal in the coming days.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
